name: Christmas Cream Wafers
recipeInstructions:
Combine wafer ingredients and chill. Roll out on a floured surface to 1/2 inch thickness. Cut into small rounds. Transfer to wax paper covered with 1 cup sugar. Thoroughly coat both sides and place on cookie sheet. Prick with fork and bake at 350 degrees for 7-10 minutes. Cool.
Combine filling ingredients. Spread the filling on wafers and sandwich two wafers together.
